Trezor.io/Start® | Starting Up Your Device | Trezor®

Trezor.io/Start® | Starting Up Your Device | Trezor®

Welcome to Trezor.io/Start®

Begin your journey into crypto security with Trezor.io/Start® — the official and most secure platform to initialize your Trezor® hardware wallet. Whether you're a first-time user or transitioning from another device, our simple step-by-step process ensures you’re set up safely and correctly.

Visit Trezor.io/Start® to download the official Trezor Suite™, install firmware updates, and configure your wallet. Back up your recovery seed, set up your PIN, and gain full control over your digital assets — all under the protection of the industry-trusted Trezor® ecosystem.

Security is our priority. Trezor™ ensures your private keys never leave your device. With our guided setup process, you can confidently manage your cryptocurrency portfolio while minimizing risks. Start today and take the first step towards smarter, safer crypto management.

What is Trezor.io/Start®?
Trezor.io/Start® is the official setup platform for new Trezor® users to initialize and secure their devices.
Is Trezor Suite™ necessary?
Yes, Trezor Suite™ offers secure wallet management, firmware updates, and access to key crypto services.
How long does setup take?
Setup is fast and easy, typically taking 5–10 minutes from start to finish with the guided instructions.
